mnemonics: A TOOL SET: Agile Techniques Optimizing Output & Learning - Scrum, Extreme Programming, Kanban, Lean
keyPoints: Scrum: Framework with roles (Scrum Master, Product Owner), events (Sprints, Stand-ups), and artifacts (Product Backlog).
Extreme Programming (XP): Focuses on technical excellence with practices like pair programming and test-driven development.
Kanban: Visual workflow management system using a board to limit work-in-progress and optimize flow.
Lean: Principles for eliminating waste (Muda) and maximizing value delivery to the customer.
commonMistakes: Treating Agile as a rigid, phase-by-phase process rather than an iterative, flexible mindset.
Using Scrum ceremonies (like Daily Stand-ups) as status reports for a manager instead of a planning session for the team.
Ignoring technical practices from XP (like refactoring) when using Scrum, leading to technical debt.
